data.title: Update Lab research archive with actual document links and descriptions from research doc

data.body: The Lab research archive was built by agents without the actual content. Need to populate it with the real document links and descriptions from the fractal-os research doc (Writing section, Podcasts section, NYC section). Content is in: /Users/jules/Documents/dev/fractal-os/notes/2026-03-28-fractal-nyc-website-research.md — see the Writing, Podcasts & Talks, and New York City sections. The agents included some leader Substacks on their own but the core essays, talks, and NYC content are missing.

Implementation complete. 31 documents in LAB_DOCUMENTS (22 new, 9 existing). 4 new people added (Ulysses, Hailey, Christine, Keesh). Tyler updated with role/houses/socials. 21 new tags in TAG_LABELS. Talk category added to DocumentCategory + DocumentBadge. TypeScript clean. URLs that 404'd and were omitted: A Neighborhood Stroll (andrewjrose.substack.com), The Gardener Leader (andrewjrose.substack.com), How to Turn Your Home Into a Third Space (prigoose.substack.com). Origin Story of Fractal (Priya, 2023) not found as standalone Spotify episode — may be the Reach Truth Podcast episode. Network State Conference talk linked to Priya's recap post since direct video URL not found.

Review pass. 31 documents in LAB_DOCUMENTS (22 new). 4 new people added (Ulysses, Hailey, Christine, Keesh) with appropriate roles/houses/socials. Tyler updated from TODOs to real data. 21 new tags in TAG_LABELS, alphabetically sorted. 'talk' category added to DocumentCategory + DocumentBadge with Megaphone icon. All document entries have id, title, author, description, url, category, tags. TypeScript clean. Meets all acceptance criteria. Note: 3 URLs that 404'd were correctly omitted and documented in implementation comment.
